text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... you're right. Next time, let's try...<n>a higher
mountain.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Nothing beats standing atop a chilly<n>peak... and
enjoying a hot cup of coffee<n>as your breath turns
white... Heh.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Maybe next time... you'll be more willing<n>to have
a cup of my brew.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Let's have a long chat... I can hear<n>your
voice clearly... in the quiet<n>mountain air.
